creationInfo.comment: Self-contained root SBOM for airgap-cpp-devkit. Package checksums are the SHA-256 of the prebuilt artifacts under prebuilt/.

packages.name: airgap-cpp-devkit
packages.comment: Air-gapped C++ developer toolkit. All tools work without internet access. Targets Windows 10/11 (Git Bash/MINGW64) and RHEL 8/9.

packages.name: toolchains/llvm
packages.comment: LLVM/Clang 22.1.3 prebuilt (Windows + Linux) and source build. Includes clang, clang++, clang-format, clang-tidy, lld. Full prebuilt split at 50MB (.tar.xz).

packages.name: toolchains/llvm-mingw
packages.comment: llvm-mingw 20260407 UCRT MinGW-w64 cross-compiler toolchain for Windows and Linux. Split at 50MB (.tar.xz).

packages.name: toolchains/ninja
packages.comment: Ninja 1.13.2 build system. Prebuilt single-binary for Windows and Linux. Source build supported.

packages.name: toolchains/gcc
packages.comment: GCC 15.2.0. Windows: WinLibs GCC 15.2.0 mingw-w64ucrt 14.0.0 r7 (.tar.xz 4 parts). Linux: gcc-toolset-15 RHEL 8 RPMs (.tar.xz 2 parts). Includes gcov.

packages.name: toolchains/lcov
packages.comment: lcov 2.4 code coverage frontend for gcov. Linux only. RPM for RHEL 8 + source tarball. Requires Perl.

packages.name: toolchains/llvm/style-formatter
packages.comment: Git pre-commit hook enforcing LLVM C++ style via clang-format. bootstrap.sh installs hook into any git repo.

packages.name: build-tools/cmake
packages.comment: CMake 4.3.1 prebuilt for Windows x64 and Linux x86_64. Single .tar.xz per platform, no split required.

packages.name: dev-tools/conan
packages.comment: Conan 2.27.1 C/C++ package manager. Windows: .tar.xz. Linux: .deb.

packages.name: dev-tools/servy
packages.comment: Servy 7.9 Windows service manager. Windows only. Portable .tar.xz.

packages.name: dev-tools/sqlite
packages.comment: SQLite 3.53.0 CLI. Windows and Linux .tar.xz. RHEL 8 .rpm.

packages.name: dev-tools/git-bundle
packages.comment: Git bundle transfer utility for air-gapped environments. Pure Python.

packages.name: frameworks/grpc
packages.comment: gRPC v1.81.1 for Windows C++. Prebuilt .zip per MSVC toolset (v142/v143/v145), split parts.

packages.name: lib/zlib
packages.copyrightText: Copyright (C) 1995-2024 Jean-loup Gailly and Mark Adler
packages.comment: zlib 1.3.2 gzip/DEFLATE compression library, built from vendored source via CMake (headers + static and shared libs). Windows x64 source .zip and Linux x64 source .tar.gz.

packages.name: languages/python
packages.comment: Python 3.14.4. Windows: full .zip and embeddable .zip. Linux: cpython standalone .tar.xz 2 parts. Source build supported.

packages.name: languages/dotnet
packages.comment: NET SDK 10.0.202. Windows and Linux .tar.xz split at 50MB (4 and 3 parts respectively). No installer required.

packages.name: dev-tools/devkit-ui
packages.comment: FastAPI + HTMX web UI for managing devkit tool installs. Auto-discovers tools from devkit.json.

packages.name: languages/python/pip-packages
packages.comment: Vendored pip wheel files for offline Python use. 27 packages including numpy, pandas, scipy, scikit-learn, matplotlib, plotly, requests, PyYAML, pydantic, streamlit, and more.

packages.name: dev-tools/filezilla
packages.comment: FileZilla 3.70.4 FTP/SFTP client. Windows: prebuilt NSIS installer. Linux: prebuilt binary tarball.

packages.name: dev-tools/gdb
packages.comment: GDB 17.1 GNU debugger. Linux only. Source build from vendored gdb-17.1.tar.gz (~25 min). Requires gcc, make, readline-devel.

packages.name: dev-tools/notepadpp
packages.comment: Notepad++ 8.9.3 text editor. Windows only. Portable zip (no admin required) + NSIS installer.

packages.name: dev-tools/putty
packages.comment: PuTTY 0.83 SSH/SCP client. Windows: prebuilt MSI. Linux: source build from vendored putty-0.83.tar.gz using CMake (CLI tools only).

packages.name: dev-tools/sourcetree
packages.comment: SourceTree 3.4.30 Git GUI client. Windows only. Squirrel installer installs to %LocalAppData%\SourceTree.

packages.name: github.com/tus/tusd/v2
packages.comment: Go dependency vendored under server/vendor. Provides the resumable (tus) upload protocol handler and on-disk filestore for large package uploads. go.sum: h1:2yOGmkrDl9RQmRIt/00DR2WvYWOoiEu3CoygILb+WRw=

packages.name: golang.org/x/exp
packages.comment: Transitive Go dependency of tusd (slog/slices), vendored under server/vendor. go.sum: h1:yqrTHse8TCMW1M1ZCP+VAR/l0kKxwaAIqN/il7x4voA=

packages.name: tus-js-client
packages.comment: Vendored browser client (UMD) at server/web/static/tus.min.js. Drives resumable chunked uploads from the dashboard. SHA-256 is of the vendored minified file.

packages.name: os-distribution-logos
packages.comment: Vendored OS/distribution logo set under server/web/static/img/ (rhel, rocky, almalinux, centos, fedora, ubuntu, debian, mint, opensuse, suse, arch, alpine, macos). SVG brand icons from the Simple Icons project, licensed CC0-1.0 (public domain). Shown in the devkit UI to identify the detected platform. Each attribution line is the SHA-256 of a vendored SVG; update on logo refresh.
